text: Rheumatic arthritis problems/symptoms dissapeared. No more morning stifness, no more joint pains. More energy, more appetite. Severe lung complications: Dyspneu, Pneunomonitis (inflammation of lung tissue), severe fever (40.3�). Inlammation of cornea. No relief of Sj�grens syndrome symptoms. First treatment with Humira resulted in a drop of the bloodpressure. Hospitalization, high doses of Prednisolon, Claritromycine and other antibiotics. Pantropazol, Atrovent, Salbutamol
